summary: Tightened qd roadmap validation so the committed qd export must keep the deterministic top-level envelope and required collection types.

acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The roadmap export validator now requires .schema_version == 2; evidence/m4-qd-export-envelope-contract/negative-smoke-bad-schema-version.log records a temporary-copy rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh requires exported_at == 1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z for deterministic committed exports.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The roadmap export validator now requires the deterministic epoch exported_at value; evidence/m4-qd-export-envelope-contract/negative-smoke-bad-exported-at.log records a temporary-copy rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh requires registries to be an object.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The roadmap export validator now requires .registries to have object type; evidence/m4-qd-export-envelope-contract/negative-smoke-non-object-registries.log records a temporary-copy rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh requires nodes, edges, runs, findings, node_notes, assignments, waves, and wave_memberships to be arrays.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The roadmap export validator now checks all required top-level collection fields as arrays; evidence/m4-qd-export-envelope-contract/negative-smoke-non-array-top-level-collections.log records a rejection for each required collection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-export-envelope-contract/qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing with the stricter envelope validation.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, and temporary-copy negative smoke tests.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, git-diff-check.log, and the four requested temporary-copy negative smoke logs.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: This node only changes repository qd metadata validation; realWorldValidation is marked not_required.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd export validation only; no product runtime, macOS, hardware, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, or latency behavior is claimed.
